title: LLM-RTK (Large Language Model Red Teaming Kit)
description: Adversarial testing framework for GenAI systems that executes objective-driven attack prompts and analyzes responses to identify potential security weaknesses aligned with OWASP GenAI risks, including prompt injection, data leakage, role escalation, and policy bypass behaviors.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
